segments.text: I'm sorry for being late.
i did not know that this program is in a beautiful place like
And here you see,
A beautiful painting of Michelangelo expressing the desire
Of your father to save and help you out
In Germany we have had very great aggressive
happenings, and that brought forth a devastating effect on the Western life all over.
The value systems were broken –the idea of dharma was disturbed– women started
behaving like men—and so many people died!
Very young people died very-very young.
All their desires were not fulfilled, all their life gave them nothing but war.
That was a kind of heat wave that came destroying
the subtler things when nature gets its spite or is angry
it destroys only gross thing
But when human beings start destroying, they destroy even the subtler things like your
value system – you character ,your chastity and innocence . Your forbearance.
So now war is on at a settler level we have to understand that all these things
have brought such a shattering effect in the West, on the Western personality.
So first effort one has to do is repair it – put its state and make it stand on Its
own legs because people lost their personality or tradition they had no moodings nor roots
And they started moving towards anything that was brought in as some sort of a intellectual
experience.
The women became very independent and they thought,
They can work out their own problems
That the thought ,they become like men
Here is problem started even in a worse way
Because woman Is A Woman
on a very little thing which is called as man in her.
And when she tries to avoid what She has
and develops something that She has, very little
then She becomes funny
but She may be possessed by so many men who are dead
the desire
To become Manly
can attract
So Many Booths Who want to enter into woman's mind
And when they enter,
They have the garb of a woman and mind
Of devil.
And women can not see it
Because maybe with those devilish things
In worldly way
May be successful
There might better off
Maybe there can dominate everyone
They may become meticulous like men
Absolutely matter-of fact
Very neat tidy clean
devoid of all beauty and sweetness,
then these women ultimately become like vampires.
So though the war is over
it's working through
The Women Of Germany I think
–I'd heard this attack had come before also
And they were women called as Amazonic
Now that history is repeating itself again
The other day i had an interview with
a German lady
And I was amazed at her attitude because I felt she is still a nazi in her, some naziputicity
you know.
She has the double personality – one way she talking sweetly and other ways she
as a Nazi or a fascist but very cunning they have got arguments…
The first thing that can do it to say we are siding with downtrodden people like
India!
Indians are Aryans, we're Aryan's and people who are sympathizing with the Aryas.
Indians have spiritual people
And they feel that there like Indians of all things
Can you believe it?
The quality life should improve is a point
The quality men
Is different from women I've told many times
And if women try to be manly, then they cannot achieve anything proper.
You have had many like this – you've seen Mao's wife ,you're seeing Mrs Chiang Kai-Shek
now there is a new lady called Carlos, Carlos her name was, Marcos, Marcos
So much of the men are always make mess up things when they tried to be manly
In the history we have many women.
in India, women are very well equipped
We've had woman like Jhansi ki Rani
who fought against British
She was a widow
she tied her child on Her back
and fought with British
They say that her horse jumped
from 180 feet
From the turret of a fort
And The Britishers has written down
That though we have got Jhansi, the victory comes to us but glory goes
To Jhansikinani. We've had great women in India
Like Nurjaan was another great woman
We're Chand Bibi, Ahilyabai
But they were all women
They didn't'have ego of men
When it come'sto one can work
Work In The Offices
With Man
And then you not become man
I'll tell You an example Of My own
I had to build our house in Lucknow, I did it thing a real woman style and I built very
good house.
Better than any man could buy or build – you know–very-very way!
Like the men would go first of all he'll get an architect who will measure everything
then try fit everyting into beforehand
Then he will in his ego go to some expensive place, shop get something expensive, be cheated
by that.
And then again is the ego and gets a very expensive labor and appoints somebody – He'll
been charge of everything, incharge!
I did it on different way…
I had money, so went and found out who are the best people
Who have the best bricks.
The house was to be built by bricks
then what else do you need?
Just like a woman would cook her food
You'll also sand all right
Then we need cement
And iron bars
Iron liver
So it didn't go away men went around
I found out the man who was selling
best bricks.
So he said,
''I have no money because
i had to put up those clins and
fill them with the bricks
And for that
you require initialmoney''.
l said alright
,l'll buy one whole clean from me
Whole one
How much will You take from Me?
He said 5000 rupees is sufficient
But if he said
If a cling goes off
or there's something wrong
If it is mis-fired, then you have to look out.
I said doesn't matter!
You put one clean in My name
so i bought a complete clean from him
Kiln is the thing where they
They put all of their bricks
and cover them with mud
And fire down
Sometimes It could be that
The whole thing can go into waste
or crumple down
I said do like this
Only five thousand
When its nicely fired
and all that, it would cost you nothing short of fifty thousand rupees.
Then I went to the river
And i said how much for a one part as they call
It's big area of sand?
They say at this time when is summertime
Is very little but in winter-times
Will be quite alot
A man will go he'll say alright
Now You need so Much bring it now
then you will need more, you bring it now.
But I didn't do that."
And said,"Summer time is a nice thing cheap
You are getting why not buy the whole?"
So i bought The Whole Part
–the whole area of that sample
Then went for the iron mongers
and asked them what about Iron?
They said
-"You have to order
but if your ordering bulk
than we'll give much cheaper
and cash down
We've got pay so much".
So it was all ready, just like we do for cooking and get everything ready-made – ready there.
Then what needed were wood so they said that the wood will come from Nepal I said alright
What else?
They say any other forest can be found
So I went to a forest in the center of India called Jabalpur, there I found out.
The whole wood was cut newly-cut and
In an auction bought lot of wood from that
And got all those there plus
Got the marble form them this marble never used before
Anywhere
It's very simple
I can use this marble for everything.
So,I got marble and wood together from that place."
Then the laborer!
And then asked My friends if they knew any good workers
who are good at missionary work?
They said,"Yes!"
This one is good ,that's what it was good so
i called all of them
.I say,"See now you stay with Me in
So they all settled down with their family and I used to cook for them.
By cooking,I won over
And They would do anything for me
Absolutely
There so kind of Me
They will produce new technique that they knew
Ah..They would produce an effect of marble out the cement
All kinds of art that had put there
So, such a big house with twenty bedrooms and five drawing rooms, dining room was created
within one year's time.
Not only that but the price of this house – nobody can believe it!
Was 1 tenths of what an architect would have taken
But everything had been written so well because I didn't know how to write accounts
What did you do?
Every day I used say all right today
day I take out so much money, then this much was spent.
Like that i wrote everyday and not one single rupee
Was missing in it
So nobody could prosecute me
No problem otherwise all the officers who built their houses there had to go through lots of problems
Their income was taxed
This thing nothing happened
And got such a huge house made with such little money
And such a house that people said that even Taj Mahal may fall down, this will not fall.
Because I made good foundation everything because had bricks so cheap
the whole of the thing i bought
for no price at all and half off it sold back
beacuse there is much remaining
then what ever have got sand
I brought it
sold half of it
bcoz'I didn't need it at all
double the price
So ,i've get my sands free
The wood that I'd brought from their
I got it properly chiseled out and
had a little tank in which i put it,
so the whole thing became absolutely
what you call that weather proof.
And half of this I used
for 100 windows
and 60 doors
The rest was sold
Even the chips were sold
as burning wood
You see? Burning wood
So you can imagine something was sold as timber and some for the hearts, but I had to do cooking
for them.
And look after their comforts – got nice blankets or beds so they were very happy
with it!
That's how a woman works out…and everybody was amazed that could not find any faults
with my accounts, they could not find faults
anything and I told all My husband's friends
to keep five miles away from Me because he was
working in the prime minister. People would have
said that alright she is taking bribes
things like this then there
another problem was
They will come and tell me
This or That nor good
I kept them out because only
Men can argue
Women produce the results
No conferences, nothing.
I said – Nothing doing let Me do the job Myself."
Very nicely in company of all these people I built a house and beautiful House which
they have taken a film you might be able to see that I've build there so when
woman who is Sahaja Yogini must develop her special qualities because she's very
She always reaches the right conclusion in no time, if she's a woman but is half-man
and little of women then I don't know what sort thing it is.
So a woman should try to be so powerful like this Mother Earth who can bear every
sort of thing and she can give the best that is with her, extremely sacrificing.
Extremely giving forbearing loving forgiving when men develop women's quality then they
become saints but not a woman's qualities run after women this kind of nonsense is
They have to be Veeras, they have to be Shivalras people.
There has been brave – there is to be brave but with that
then you develop compassion and forgiveness
But I think it's the other way round in Germany very much
And also among western Sahaja Yogis this a common affair going on
Women developed horrible egos
In India women work everything they do
We have had great orators since long time, well-known but they don't have ego.
My mother was honest in those days when there were only two
and three women who've done such a degree
But I never saw her with any ego
In Her my own daughters one of them has
Done architecture
And also interior decoration she is not now working
Because the husband's work all right
But she makes houses for others, she draws for others.
She helps other freely and she has such friends!
So what is the achievement of a woman?
She have more people around her – human power
…she had more human beings around Her
And What Is The Capacity Of Men?
They Have All The Bills Of The House To Be Paid
They have to pay for the insurance,
repairs of their car. Let them do dirty jobs!
We may receive all love letters
from children and husband or everyone
they are loved
they're cared-for
Now because there become manly
we don't want these advantages
like formerly
if you were going in a bus
would give seat to a lady
now nobody does that
Once a lady was travelling, old lady and there
one young fellow sitting here.
I said why don't you allow her to sit down?
He says Why should i?
She is also wearing pant
And am also wearing the pant
This old lady was wearing trousers
So he said
Why she give seat
She's wearing trouser
Am wearing trousers
Whats difference
All that our advantage and privilege
We are losing
By becoming man
What do we gain
Actually, on the contrary I think in modern days women are much more slaves of men than
they were before.
They get very upset – say there's a Sahaja Yogini now she is caught up badly and has
certain problems first thing that will come out oh God my husband will leave me he'll
take away all My children where would i do?
She never thinks about Sahaj Yoga but have met one extraordinary woman I must
She said, Mother because I am schizophrenic
and want to get out of Sahaja Yoga.
I'll divorce my husband
but don't wanna see My children
Sahajyoga is much more important
than Me
then My Husband
and My Children
There's a woman
she says, I'm schizophrenic from childhood
I've discovered it now
But mostly women are worried about themselves
Oh God!
was to sponge on the husband, I'll have
leave my children. What about leaving Sahaja Yoga?
If you think Sahaj yoga is
most important then get rid of your schizophrenia also
Why should God help You? We are just thinking like
ordinary women only worried
yourself not worried about Sahaja Yoga
Same with some men but men
aren't so much frightened because they
can stand their legs and
And women should also know now that they are Sahaja Yoginis, and Mother is going to look
after them.
But if you're worried about yourself only – your husband my house ,my children
then it's not a sign of good woman . A woman who loves all the children her loving
capacity is great, but if she becomes miserly or small-minded then
She's not a woman.
I told you about my granddaughters and asked them what they want to be?
They're very smart so we said that
We'd like to become a nurse
Or an air hostess
So i said why? What's the big deal with these jobs?
They said Grandmother in this two jobs only you can feed people
There are no other job where You could really feed others
The joy of feeding others is greater than writing files in the office.
Absolutely, I tell you!
It's a horrid job to write files into an office
it better do some nice cooking
thinking so many are going eat and enjoy
then doing this dirty jobs
but women have lost their heads
they're not level headed now
become stupid
Now, in Germany you have to be very careful.
In Austria I've been being very carefull.
Austrian women are great but
i would say German women
that You don't try become men
first of all the best way
is not stop it and talk too much
if u start talking like man
then all the booths will enter into
U & starts talking only like a man
And than we'll see how
Men are controlled
We Indian Women know
How control over Men
Much better Than U do
Why we don't have divorces?
why We call all right, doesn´t matter
but our men do not run after another woman.
They dont dress up so much
they dont go to hairdressers
they dont have this beauty aids and that
So develop pure self-respect
You are the Shakti
you're power
if u make your man cabbages
what sort of children will he have? Cabbage only
respect them
Make them men, enjoy their manliness.
Then they'll never give you up!
There's no competition between the two
I find that main problem today in Germany is
That women have lost there senses
This i feel absolutely about German music
Take to Music
take art
So much scope it has
Today who is remembered?
See here
Who was remembered
A musician Mozart
Everyone remembers Mozart
even on a chocolate you'll find a Mozart there.
I don't know poor thing, did he ever eat any chocolates or not?
Or they will remember – see here
They have Michelangelo
and Leonardo da Vinci
And somebody like that
Nobody remembers who was the officer at their time
running with file up-and down
So women can be of eternal value
That they should develop.
The greatest thing is that woman can love and love, but when she becomes selfish
and self-centered starts worrying about herself there's no beauty in her love
Today I took it up specially this way because today you are worshipping Me as Kartikeya
Kartikeya was the son of Parvati Uma who just a mother
Of these two children Ganesha and Kartikeya
And one day the parents, Shankara and Parvati both of them said out
you two. The ones who goes around Mother Earth
first time will get a special prize so Kartikeya was
manly power absolutely
He said all right I'll start on his own
conveyance which is Epikon. Ganesha said to himself
Now look at Me, I am a little boy.
I'm not like him and My conveyance is the little mouse – how will I manage?
But then he thought my Mother is higher than whole universe!
What this Mother Earth?!
So this Kartikeya was out going round the mother earth, Shri Ganesha went around his
mother three times, and he got the prize.
Because of that motherly qualities for him she is
highest even higher than Sadashiva but surprisingly
what Sadasheva likes – that you respect your
Mother! The motherhood in Him…the woman who
did it. Yatra narya pujyante tatraman te devata
where women are respectable and respected
there God resides. Women are very important
Of course, I must blame the western men also.
The way they have treated their women
and kept out of religion
– always put them down…
India we had Muslims doing that
but there are even very sophisticated aggressors
And then did it really badly
They kept all off'em done
But doesn't matter
Still forgive them
Try to be a woman
Very powerful
The powers of a woman are that love, which is the power of God.
And this has to be used
than other argumentative intellectualism and all nonsense
Don't waste your energy with them
I would like specially these Sahaja Yoginis from Germany
To become more &more lady-like
It doesn' mean good cooking only
But in attitude towards life
To think in a wider way that the whole Sahaja Yoga depends on our love capacity.
We have to be extremely loving,
extremely kind looking after Sahaj Yogis
giving them all of joy which is possible
otherwise this country they can become like vampires
so we very careful and for men also
I would say if there are women
of that kind, you must respect them.
You must give all their privileges – look after them!
They'll look after children but they will get the assistance and money which is needed
by them.
Do not ask for accounts or things let themselves manage it at most we become bankrupt as
But first see what is their attitude towards Sahaja Yoga is.
I've seen in the families where women are in charge of the purse,
always we get much more money for sahaja yoga work
than from houses with men who have control over it
It's very surprising!
When a man has control they think about his car
and many big things
but when woman has control
They know how to save money
as I have shown you how, I've saved money.
Men can never save – they cannot ever save money!
Only the women could save but if
They had a larger interest otherwise
If their self-indulgent
will finish off all of that money
by going into shop to buy shirt for man
and then buying sarees themselves
Then we do like this
But is there wider interests
or greater interests
so cleverly
that they'll have always money to spend for others.
What do I? Whatever my husband gives me
run the house, it's quite a lot
but i sting on things and go
main markets get
things from there try to save money
on this here say one of my clothes
first time I've given my sweaters
for dry cleaning in
good shop
That is how women saves
And then she spends for general food
Because that is our real satisfaction.
If we develop a balanced view about
your married life,
About social life

If have all the fragrance in Mother Earth

how will know there is fragrance on Mother earth?

what they do their energy would be rotten

you're the flower
Advantage about
your people everybody sees you

as soon a train will start all men get out of it they can't sit there
Like I told my husband
what is this? All time we're running
Out Of The House why cant you sit In The house for some Time

If any man sits in the house

you see, and I said what do they call to a man who always runs away from the house – gharbhagna

Who runs away there should be something in between but that's manly it is all right

make the mother earth fragrant and then
we say that Mother Earth is pregnant
as beautiful all right

we should get students who are realized souls

So todays puja especially for Kartikeya
Kartikey represents
The great
We can see the captain or leader of all the ganas, like a commander-in chief.
Ganesha is king but he's the Commander in Chief and because German character
has to be command over everything we are going
You have this puja where the men will be in command of their spirits and their manly qualities
– and women, they'll become in-command for them.
To be in command is different from to being a master.
Master owns it!
A commander does not own It… he doesn't own It.
That is also lost, possession is also lost.
You just command it and that's the state we have to come now
from Ganesha State
through the state of Karthikeya
The other way round
Ganesa is nice he has a king very nicely sitting down
with all his powers alright
Innocence in there
But Kartikeya is the one who commands innocence, gives you a power of that commandment.
He commands – after the Guru Peja it's better
That we should have this Power to command others
and that Commanding Spirit comes in men through their talking
through their dynamism,
to Their personal achievements for the women
–through Their loving power
or Through There forebearance
,Through Their gracious behaviour
forgiveness compassion.
So let us develop that today
That we can command it means
It's not what We have
but in a position we are
command. I hope you understand what is Kartikeya. May God bless you!
